name: fray-codex
description: Explicit, prompt-first orchestration with model-routed Codex subagents.

interface.longDescription: Adds explicit-only Fray orchestration with a visible plan plus concise session-specific scratch notes, native blocking input for material choices, native per-dispatch model and effort routing, scoped delegation, return reconciliation, and outcome-oriented reporting.
defaultPrompt: Use $fray-codex:fray-orchestrator to run this audit as a campaign.
Use $fray-codex:fray-orchestrator and add this ask without dropping active work.
Use $fray-codex:fray-orchestrator to keep a concise session-specific checklist, summarize it in the visible plan, and ask me natively about material choices.
